Worksheet.title: RQPLEIAD_180_42_Hard_Key_OXE_Define_Key1_Lock
Worksheet.description:
F1/F2 on ALE-30,
F1/F2/F3 on ALE300/400,
Triangle/Circle/Square on ALE500

steps.action:
OXE: user---program key
Only set the progkey 123: programmed with phone A on position 1,and the lock parameter is enabled
Phone update the config file then check the file
action_substeps: OXE: user---program key
Only set the progkey 123: programmed with phone A on position 1,and the lock parameter is enabled
Phone update the config file then check the file

steps.action:
Enter the hard keys menu:
User/Device/Hard keys
steps.expected_result:
Title "Edit maximum 2 keys"
The reset to default icon is grey
ALE-300/400: The i icon display at the upper right corner of the screen
The left of the options all display the radio button,
Only F1 hard key is selected, all hard key names display grey
ALE-30:
two options: Hold cap icon/Phone A and transfer cap icon/Transfer
ALE-300/400:
three options: F1 cap icon/Phone A and transfer cap icon/Transfer and conference cap icon/Conference
ALE-500:
three options: Triangle cap icon/Phone A and Circle cap icon/Home and Square cap icon/Low power
action_substeps: Enter the hard keys menu:
User/Device/Hard keys
expected_checkpoints: Title "Edit maximum 2 keys"
The reset to default icon is grey
ALE-300/400: The i icon display at the upper right corner of the screen
The left of the options all display the radio button,
Only F1 hard key is selected, all hard key names display grey
ALE-30:
two options: Hold cap icon/Phone A and transfer cap icon/Transfer
three options: F1 cap icon/Phone A and transfer cap icon/Transfer and conference cap icon/Conference
three options: Triangle cap icon/Phone A and Circle cap icon/Home and Square cap icon/Low power

steps.action:
ALE-30: Long press the F1/F2
ALE-300/400: Long press the F1/F2/F3
ALE-500:Long press Triangle/Circle/Square
steps.expected_result:
Title "Edit maximum 2 keys"
The reset to default icon is grey
ALE-300/400: The i icon display at the upper right corner of the screen
The left of the options all display the radio button,
Only F1 hard key is selected, all hard key names display grey
ALE-30:
two options: Hold cap icon/Phone A and transfer cap icon/Transfer
ALE-300/400:
three options: F1 cap icon/Phone A and transfer cap icon/Transfer and conference cap icon/Conference
ALE-500:
three options: Triangle cap icon/Phone A and Circle cap icon/Home and Square cap icon/Low power
action_substeps: ALE-30: Long press the F1/F2
ALE-300/400: Long press the F1/F2/F3
ALE-500:Long press Triangle/Circle/Square
expected_checkpoints: Title "Edit maximum 2 keys"
The reset to default icon is grey
ALE-300/400: The i icon display at the upper right corner of the screen
The left of the options all display the radio button,
Only F1 hard key is selected, all hard key names display grey
ALE-30:
two options: Hold cap icon/Phone A and transfer cap icon/Transfer
three options: F1 cap icon/Phone A and transfer cap icon/Transfer and conference cap icon/Conference
three options: Triangle cap icon/Phone A and Circle cap icon/Home and Square cap icon/Low power

steps.action: check the f1/f2/f3 function of the ALE-500
steps.expected_result:
F1: hold
F2: transfer
F3: conference
expected_checkpoints: F1: hold
F2: transfer
F3: conference

steps.action:
ALE-500:
Check the Triangle /Circle/Square key
steps.expected_result:
The three keys name display correctly and press the hard key:
Triangle :Will makes the outgoing call to Phone A
Circle: will turn to the dashboard
Square :The screen brightness will decreased
action_substeps: Check the Triangle /Circle/Square key
expected_checkpoints: The three keys name display correctly and press the hard key:
Triangle :Will makes the outgoing call to Phone A
Circle: will turn to the dashboard
Square :The screen brightness will decreased

steps.action:
ALE-500:
Phone establish a call with phone B then press the Triangle key
steps.expected_result: Will makes the second outgoing call to phone A
action_substeps: Phone establish a call with phone B then press the Triangle key

steps.action: Phone is idle mode the led of the F1/F2/F3 is off then press the F1 key even the lock feature is enabled
steps.expected_result:
ALE-30/300/400:
Will makes the outgoing call to phone A
expected_checkpoints: Will makes the outgoing call to phone A

steps.action: Phone establish a call with phone B then press the F1
steps.expected_result:
ALE-30/300/400:
Will makes the second outgoing call to phone A
expected_checkpoints: Will makes the second outgoing call to phone A

steps.action: Phone establish two normal calls the led of the F1 is off, the led of the F2/F3 is on then press the F2 key
steps.expected_result:
ALE-30/300/400:
will exit these two calls
expected_checkpoints: will exit these two calls

steps.action: Phone establish two normal calls the led of the F1 is off, the led of the F2/F3 is on then press the F3 key
steps.expected_result:
ALE-30/300/400:
will makes the conference call, and the led of the conference is breath
expected_checkpoints: will makes the conference call, and the led of the conference is breath

steps.action: OXE: user---program key set the progkey 123 : Not Assigned

Phone Enter the hard keys menu:
User/Device/Hard keys or long press the F1/F2/F3/Triangle/Circle/Square key
steps.expected_result:
Title "Edit maximum 2 keys"
The reset to default icon is grey radio button + default cap icon + grey hard key name
ALE-30:
two options: hold cap icon/On hold and transfer cap icon/Transfer
ALE-300/400:
three options: hold cap icon/On hold and transfer cap icon/Transfer and conference cap icon/Conference
ALE-500:
three options: Triangle cap icon/Back and Circle cap icon/Home and Square cap icon/Low power
action_substeps: Phone Enter the hard keys menu:
User/Device/Hard keys or long press the F1/F2/F3/Triangle/Circle/Square key
expected_checkpoints: Title "Edit maximum 2 keys"
The reset to default icon is grey radio button + default cap icon + grey hard key name
ALE-30:
two options: hold cap icon/On hold and transfer cap icon/Transfer
three options: hold cap icon/On hold and transfer cap icon/Transfer and conference cap icon/Conference
three options: Triangle cap icon/Back and Circle cap icon/Home and Square cap icon/Low power

The left of the options all display the radio button,
F2 hard key name is light the other key is grey
Only F2 hard key is selected and the edit icon is displayed on the right

ALE-300/400:
three options: hold cap icon/On hold and Red cap icon/Emergency and conference cap icon/Conference

steps.action:
ALE-500:
Check the Triangle /Circle/Square key
steps.expected_result:
The three keys name display correctly(emergency is red color) and press the hard key:
Triangle :Will Return to the previous interface
Circle: Will makes the outgoing call to Emergency
Square :The screen brightness will decreased

steps.action: Phone is idle mode the led of the F1/F2/F3 is off then press the F2 key
steps.expected_result:
ALE-30/300/400:
Makes the outgoing call to the emergency and the screen display correctly
expected_checkpoints: Makes the outgoing call to the emergency and the screen display correctly

steps.action:
Phone establish a normal call.
During the converstiaon then press the F2 key
steps.expected_result:

Makes the new outgoing call to the emergency and the screen display correctly

During the converstiaon then press the F2 key

will hold the call, and led of the F1 key is breath

steps.action: Phone establish two normal calls the led of the F1/F3 is on then press the F3 key
steps.expected_result:

will make the conference call,and led of the F3 key is breath

ALE-300/400:
